callouts.label: ADD REVIEW
callouts.message: Allowed only if route permission is pullback only and holding source tier is not proxy.

callouts.label: HOLD ABOVE
callouts.message: Core exposure remains acceptable while price holds above this trend support.

callouts.label: TRIM / NO CHASE
callouts.message: Avoid broad chase; rebalance weak beta or concentration if price pushes into this zone.

callouts.label: DEFEND BELOW
callouts.message: Break below 200D with volatility expansion shifts route defensive.

callouts.label: HARD RISK
callouts.message: Hard risk line: stop adding, reassess holdings, reset opportunity list.

confirmation_strip.label: Broad regime
confirmation_strip.read: Broad regime supports holding core risk.

confirmation_strip.label: Rates / duration
confirmation_strip.read: Bond weakness keeps rate pressure on valuations.

confirmation_strip.label: Volatility
confirmation_strip.read: Volatility confirms or contradicts price trend.

invalidation_trigger: Break below 200D 6,863 with VIX expansion shifts posture defensive.
next_action: Add-review only on controlled pullback/reclaim above 7,208–7,319; defense below 6,658.
